title: Minnesota Metadata Membrane Mesh - Outside/Inside Binary Audit Arena

inherited_from.principle: metadata claims must disclose scope, purpose, record location, verification method, and receipt

membrane_purpose: Create a lawful public-metadata audit mesh for Minnesota data surfaces using receipts, public records, repo artifacts, schemas, and validation outputs only.

allowed: inspect public records and published reports

mn_data_audit_lanes.description: Index public Minnesota records, reports, schemas, policies, and published datasets without private extraction.
Record what a public entity says it collects, why, where it is published, and what receipt supports the statement.
Use GitHub Actions and verifier scripts to validate JSON, paths, required public text, and hash-ready artifacts.
Route public corrections, broken links, and audit findings through GitHub issues.

federal_visibility_lens.label: NSA_REPLAY_PUBLIC_LENS
federal_visibility_lens.meaning: Public-source oversight vocabulary only; no intrusion, no operational targeting, no non-public collection.

utah_data_center_lens.label: UTAH_PUBLIC_INFRASTRUCTURE_LENS
utah_data_center_lens.meaning: Public infrastructure metadata audit only; no technical targeting or facility operations mapping.
audit_questions: What must remain out of scope?

evidence_scale.GREEN: Direct public receipt, commit, validated JSON, workflow pass, public citation, or external receipt.
evidence_scale.YELLOW: Plausible or prepared but missing one required receipt.
evidence_scale.RED: Unsupported, private, unverifiable, overclaimed, or outside scope.
